title: Chicken Biryani
description: A spicy Indian-inspired dish made with marinated chicken and layered rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the biryani masala and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the rice by rinsing it in cold water and draining well.
In a large saucepan, combine the rice and 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
To assemble the biryani, place a layer of rice in a large serving dish, followed by a layer of chicken mixture.
Repeat this process until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of rice on top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
